selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining low-entropy systemv3 packet on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active A2 trust, entropy, mode, and holodeck packet into controller-facing admission and triage fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next archaeology follow-on after the active low-entropy systemv3 packet is reduced.
Best next controller weak-lane pair once the active A2 packet is narrowed.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the active A2 admission, entropy, mode, and holodeck packet needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: INPUT_TRUST_AND_QUARANTINE_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Provides a compact controller rule for intake trust and quarantine before reuse or promotion routing.

candidate_items.name: OUTSIDE_PATTERN_METHOD_NOT_WORLDVIEW_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps adjacent-model borrowing useful without letting it import worldview or ontology.

candidate_items.name: FOUNDATION_VS_SCAFFOLD_LANE_TRIAGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent mode split into a controller-ready triage rule for lane diagnosis.

candidate_items.name: ENTROPY_FRONTIER_STEERING_OVER_WORDING_CHURN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent entropy packet into a controller steering rule against more broad wording churn.

candidate_items.name: HOLODECK_A2_EDGE_SEAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the holodeck packet as A2-edge fuel while keeping lower-loop sealing intact.

quarantined_items.name: PLAYBOOK_DIRECT_ACTIVE_A2_MUTATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Playbook-level integration instructions cannot authorize active A2 mutation from this intake lane.

quarantined_items.name: HUMAN_AUTO_TOPOLOGY_NUMERIC_COLLAPSE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The human and auto topology surfaces still need a dedicated contradiction pass rather than silent numeric collapse.

notes: This batch was produced after the control-spine and stage2/public controller reductions as the next low-entropy active-A2 reduction.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
